description_long: This is a single-story wooden cabin set on a rectangular plot of land, surrounded by a low fence. The cabin features a prominent gable roof with deep overhangs and a covered porch area at the front, supported by visible posts. The exterior walls are clad in natural wood, giving it a rustic appearance, and the roof is finished in a dark material, likely asphalt shingles or metal. Several windows of varying sizes are distributed asymmetrically along the visible facades, providing natural light to the interior. The property includes a paved driveway and a large rectangular area at the rear, possibly intended as a patio or pool. The landscape is mostly grass with defined walkways connecting the entrance, driveway, and rear area.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a gable roof, covered porch, and asymmetrical windows, set on a fenced grassy lot with paved walkways and a rear patio area.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, covered porch, and a clear view of the gable roof and front windows.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the driveway, the side of the cabin, and the large paved area at the rear of the property.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back facade of the cabin, the full extent of the fenced yard, and the large rectangular patio or pool area.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the porch, the side elevation, and the relationship between the cabin and the surrounding fence.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with deep overhangs, likely asphalt shingles or metal
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple windows of varying sizes, asymmetrically distributed along the front and side facades, with no clear pattern or clustering
attribute_door_placement: Single main door centered on the front facade beneath the porch
